'''Eyrgen''' was an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Moff/Legends|Moff]]. Eyrgen vied with Moff [[Utoxx Prentioch]] for control of the [[Wornal sector/Legends|Wornal sector]] following the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]].

==Appearances==
*{{JournalCite|7|The Kaal Connection|reprint=1}} {{Mo}}
